form.label: AI Cost Analysis Dashboard
form.description: Track and analyze GenAI inference costs across providers

search.query: `gen_ai_base` gen_ai.provider.name=$provider_filter$ `gen_ai_calculate_cost` | stats sum(gen_ai.cost.calculated_total) as total_cost | eval total_cost="$"+tostring(round(total_cost, 2), "commas")
`gen_ai_base` gen_ai.provider.name=$provider_filter$ `gen_ai_calculate_cost` | stats avg(gen_ai.cost.calculated_total) as avg_cost | eval avg_cost="$"+tostring(round(avg_cost, 4), "commas")

`gen_ai_base` gen_ai.provider.name=$provider_filter$ `gen_ai_calculate_cost` | bucket _time span=1d | stats sum(gen_ai.cost.calculated_total) as daily_cost by _time | stats avg(daily_cost) as avg_daily | eval avg_daily="$"+tostring(round(avg_daily, 2), "commas")

`gen_ai_base` gen_ai.provider.name=$provider_filter$ `gen_ai_calculate_cost` earliest=-7d | stats sum(gen_ai.cost.calculated_total) as week_cost | eval monthly_projection=(week_cost/7)*30 | eval monthly_projection="$"+tostring(round(monthly_projection, 2), "commas")
`gen_ai_base` gen_ai.provider.name=$provider_filter$ `gen_ai_calculate_cost` | timechart sum(gen_ai.cost.calculated_total) as total_cost by gen_ai.provider.name

`gen_ai_base` gen_ai.provider.name=$provider_filter$ `gen_ai_enrich_metadata` | stats count as requests, sum(gen_ai.usage.total_tokens) as total_tokens, sum(gen_ai.cost.calculated_total) as total_cost, avg(gen_ai.cost.calculated_total) as avg_cost_per_request by gen_ai.provider.name, gen_ai.request.model | eval total_cost=round(total_cost, 2), avg_cost_per_request=round(avg_cost_per_request, 4), cost_per_1k_tokens=round((total_cost/total_tokens)*1000, 4) | sort - total_cost

`gen_ai_base` gen_ai.provider.name=$provider_filter$ `gen_ai_calculate_cost` | stats count as requests, sum(gen_ai.usage.total_tokens) as total_tokens, sum(gen_ai.cost.calculated_total) as total_cost by gen_ai.user.id, gen_ai.app.name | eval total_cost=round(total_cost, 2) | sort - total_cost | head 20

`gen_ai_base` gen_ai.provider.name=$provider_filter$ `gen_ai_calculate_cost` | stats sum(gen_ai.cost.calculated_total) as total_cost by gen_ai.app.name | eval total_cost=round(total_cost, 2) | sort - total_cost | head 10

`gen_ai_base` gen_ai.provider.name=$provider_filter$ `gen_ai_enrich_metadata` | stats count as requests, sum(gen_ai.usage.total_tokens) as total_tokens, sum(gen_ai.cost.calculated_total) as total_cost, avg(gen_ai.client.operation.duration) as avg_latency_sec by gen_ai.provider.name, gen_ai.request.model | eval cost_per_request=round(total_cost/requests, 4), tokens_per_request=round(total_tokens/requests, 0), cost_per_1k_tokens=round((total_cost/total_tokens)*1000, 4), cost_efficiency_score=round((requests*1000)/(total_cost*avg_latency_sec), 2) | sort - cost_efficiency_score

`gen_ai_base` gen_ai.provider.name=$provider_filter$ `gen_ai_calculate_cost` | eval timestamp=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), cost_display="$"+tostring(round(gen_ai.cost.calculated_total, 4), "commas") | sort - gen_ai.cost.calculated_total | table timestamp, gen_ai.provider.name, gen_ai.request.model, gen_ai.user.id, gen_ai.app.name, gen_ai.usage.total_tokens, cost_display, gen_ai.client.operation.duration | head 50
